desc.de:
Die hier benutzten Marker können Sie im Festo Didaictic Infoportal herunterladen. (ip.festo-didactic.com)
Enthaltene Module für cp: - CP-AM-CAM-V2 - CP-AM-CAM - CP-AM-DRILL - CP-AM-iDRILL - CP-AM-iPICK - CP-AM-LABEL-V2 - CP-AM-LABEL-V3 - CP-AM-LABEL - CP-AM-MAG - CP-AM-MEASURE-V2 - CP-AM-MEASURE - CP-AM-MPRESS-V2 - CP-AM-MPRESS - CP-AM-OUT - CP-AM-OVEN - CP-AM-PRESS - CP-AM-TURNOVER
desc.en:
You can download the markers at the Festo Didactic Infoportal. (ip.festo-didactic.com)
Included modules for cp: - CP-AM-CAM-V2 - CP-AM-CAM - CP-AM-DRILL - CP-AM-iDRILL - CP-AM-iPICK - CP-AM-LABEL-V2 - CP-AM-LABEL-V3 - CP-AM-LABEL - CP-AM-MAG - CP-AM-MEASURE-V2 - CP-AM-MEASURE - CP-AM-MPRESS-V2 - CP-AM-MPRESS - CP-AM-OUT - CP-AM-OVEN - CP-AM-PRESS - CP-AM-TURNOVER
